# Xuenong Hu | Engineering Portfolio

> This file provides a clean, highly structured summary of Xuenong Hu's professional portfolio for LLMs, AI search engines, and context windows.

## Core Summary
Xuenong Hu is a seasoned Research Engineer at GE Vernova specializing in Sustainable Energy Systems, smart grids, and utility-scale power infrastructure design based in Niskayuna, New York. 

With more than 28 years of power grid engineering experience—including a comprehensive tenure as a Senior Engineer, Project Manager, and Technical Lead at Shanghai Electric Group Co., Ltd.—his core competence centers on bridging the gap between cutting-edge theoretical simulation and stable physical grid deployment.

## Technical Toolset & Core Competencies
- **Engineering Specialties:** Renewable Integration, Smart Grid Infrastructure, Transient Stability Modeling, Green Energy Asset Management, Thermal Power Optimization.
- **Tools & Frameworks:** MATLAB / Simulink, Python, NumPy, SciPy, Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) Optimization Frameworks.

## Website Map & Navigation
- [Home / Biography](https://xuenonghu.github.io/index.html) - Personal background, core timeline, and philosophical focus.
- [Experience](https://xuenonghu.github.io/experience.html) - Multi-decade industrial history spanning GE Vernova and Shanghai Electric.
- [Projects](https://xuenonghu.github.io/projects.html) - Technical documentation on systems design (e.g., Transient Stability & Frequency Response Simulator, BESS Dispatch Optimizer).
- [Publications](https://xuenonghu.github.io/publications.html) - Research papers, patents, and academic contributions.
- [Blog](https://xuenonghu.github.io/blog.html) - Technical essays on power grid resiliency and system optimization frameworks.
